evals.prompt: Enable ad and tracker blocking on all my devices
evals.expected_output: Enables ads and tracking blocklists on all tunnels
expectations: Calls dns_get_options to show available blocklists
Calls dns_set_subscription for ads with enabled=1 and apply_to_all=1
Calls dns_set_subscription for tracking with enabled=1 and apply_to_all=1
Confirms the subscriptions were applied

evals.prompt: A website is broken, I think it's being blocked. Whitelist example.com
expectations: Calls dns_add_whitelist with domain=example.com
Confirms the domain was whitelisted
Optionally offers apply_to_all

evals.prompt: Set up DNS blocking on my phone without using VPN
evals.expected_output: Creates a Secure DNS hash and provides setup instructions
expectations: Calls public_dns_create_hash to generate DoH/DoT URLs
Provides the DoH URL and DoT hostname
Gives platform-specific setup instructions (iOS or Android)
Explains this works without the tunnel

evals.prompt: What's being blocked on my network?
evals.expected_output: Shows DNS blocking stats and active subscriptions
expectations: Calls dns_blocklist_stats to show overall stats
Calls dns_get_tunnel_config or dns_get_all_tunnel_configs to show config
Presents total blocked domains and active blocklists

evals.prompt: Show me a summary of DNS blocking across all my tunnels
evals.expected_output: Shows DNS config for all tunnels in one view
expectations: Calls dns_get_all_tunnel_configs to get cross-tunnel DNS config
Presents per-tunnel blocking status, subscriptions, whitelists, and blacklists
Shows base protections and tunnel count

evals.prompt: Which of my tunnels have example.com whitelisted or blacklisted?
evals.expected_output: Searches custom rules across all tunnels for the domain
expectations: Calls dns_get_user_custom_rules with domain=example.com
Shows which tunnels have the domain in whitelists or blacklists
Displays reason and blocked_by info when available

evals.prompt: Which blocklists are enabled on which tunnels?
evals.expected_output: Shows subscription breakdown across all tunnels
expectations: Calls dns_get_user_subscriptions to get cross-tunnel subscriptions
Presents the per-list summary with enabled/disabled counts
Shows total tunnel count and subscription count
